title: I am a wise wealth creator
subtitle: A present-tense affirmation for claiming the identity of someone who builds money deliberately.
excerpt: A short affirmation practice from Day 23 of the MONEY program. Use to plant the wealth-creator identity at the start of the day or before any financial decision.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 23 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use before making a financial decision, or any time the old "I'm not good with money" story tries to run the show.

content.text: An affirmation from Day 23 of the MONEY program. The word "wise" is load-bearing here: it's the alternative to both careless and anxious. A wise wealth creator isn't reckless with money or frightened of it. She reads the situation and acts deliberately.
This affirmation is a claim, not a question. Say it as the title of who you already are, not who you might become one day.
I am a wise wealth creator.
Say it out loud three times in the morning, hand on heart. If you want, follow it with one concrete decision that a wise wealth creator would make today — even a small one.
Adapted from Day 23 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
